name: qa-workflow-extension
description: Generate, refine, and automate QA test cases via the Claude CLI

commands.title: QA: Generate Test Cases from Requirement
QA: Mark Test Cases as Refined
QA: Run Playwright Tests & Record Report

qaWorkflow.dashboardDataPath.description: Path (absolute, or relative to the workspace root) to the qa-dashboard data directory containing testcases.json and results.json.

qaWorkflow.targetAppPath.description: Path (absolute, or relative to the workspace root) to the application under test, where generated Playwright specs are written.

qaWorkflow.claudeCliPath.description: Path to the claude CLI executable.
